---
title: "hw4_wlien"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# HW4 test run

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(fixest)
library(gtsummary)
library(janitor)
library(jtools)
library(plm)

# for clustered SE + tidy output
# install.packages(c("sandwich", "lmtest", "broom"))
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
branas_data <- read_csv(here("branas2011_simulated_panel.csv"))

glimpse(branas_data)
```

```{r}

lm(crime_gun_assaults ~ treated * post, data = branas_data)


```

```{r}

m_plm <- plm(
  crime_gun_assaults ~ treated * post,
  data = branas_data,
  index = c("lot_id", "year"),
  model = "within"
)


```

```{r}
pre_data <- branas_data %>%
  filter(post == 0)


pre_data %>%
  select(
    treated,
    area_sqft, median_age, unemployed_sqmi,
    college_sqmi, income_sqmi,
    black_sqmi, hispanic_sqmi, poverty_sqmi
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = treated,
    statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"
  )

```

```{r}

baseline_lot <- branas_data %>%
  filter(post == 0) %>%
  group_by(lot_id) %>%
  slice_min(year, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

glimpse(baseline_lot)

```

```{r}

library(cobalt)

bal.tab(
  treated ~ area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi +
    college_sqmi + income_sqmi +
    black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi,
  data = baseline_lot,
  estimand = "ATT"
)

```

```{r}

love.plot(
  treated ~ area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi +
    college_sqmi + income_sqmi +
    black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi,
  data = baseline_lot,
  thresholds = c(m = 0.1)
)

```

```{r}

pre_trend <- branas_data %>%
  filter(post == 0)


```

```{r}


pre_avg <- pre_trend %>%
  group_by(year, treated) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_gun = mean(crime_gun_assaults, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}


ggplot(pre_avg, aes(x = year, y = mean_gun, color = factor(treated))) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    color = "Treated",
    y = "Mean Gun Assaults",
    title = "Pre-treatment Trends"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}


lm(crime_gun_assaults ~ treated * year, data = pre_trend)

```

```{r}

baseline_cov <- baseline_lot %>%
  select(
    lot_id,
    area_sqft, median_age, unemployed_sqmi, college_sqmi, income_sqmi,
    black_sqmi, hispanic_sqmi, poverty_sqmi, vacant_lot_density
  )

branas_panel <- branas_data %>%
  select(-area_sqft, -median_age, -unemployed_sqmi, -college_sqmi, -income_sqmi,
         -black_sqmi, -hispanic_sqmi, -poverty_sqmi, -vacant_lot_density) %>%
  left_join(baseline_cov, by = "lot_id")


```

```{r}

m1 <- lm(
  crime_gun_assaults ~ treated * post +
    area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi + college_sqmi + income_sqmi +
    black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi + vacant_lot_density +
    factor(section):factor(year),
  data = branas_panel
)

# cluster-robust vcov (by contiguous-lot group)
V1 <- vcovCL(m1, cluster = ~ contig_group_id, type = "HC1")

# cluster-robust coefficient test
coeftest(m1, vcov. = V1)


```

```{r}

summ(m1, vcov = V1, model.fit = FALSE, digits = 3)


```

```{r}

outcomes <- c(
  "crime_gun_assaults",
  "crime_robberies",
  "crime_vandalism",
  "crime_disorderly",
  "crime_illegal_dumping",
  "health_high_stress",
  "health_high_chol",
  "health_high_bp",
  "health_low_exercise",
  "health_poor_health"
)


```

```{r}

fit_one <- function(y) {
  f <- as.formula(paste0(
    y, " ~ treated * post + ",
    "area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi + college_sqmi + income_sqmi + ",
    "black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi + vacant_lot_density + ",
    "factor(section):factor(year)"
  ))
  m <- lm(f, data = branas_panel)
  V <- vcovCL(m, cluster = ~contig_group_id, type = "HC1")

  tidy(m, vcov = V) %>%
    filter(term == "treated:post") %>%
    mutate(outcome = y)
}

did_tbl <- map_dfr(outcomes, fit_one) %>%
  mutate(
    conf.low = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    conf.high = estimate + 1.96 * std.error
  )
did_tbl


```

```{r}

fit_one <- function(y) {
  f <- as.formula(paste0(
    y, " ~ treated * post + ",
    "area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi + college_sqmi + income_sqmi + ",
    "black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi + vacant_lot_density + ",
    "factor(section):factor(year)"
  ))
  m <- lm(f, data = branas_panel)
  V <- vcovCL(m, cluster = ~contig_group_id, type = "HC1")

  tidy(m, vcov = V) %>%
    filter(term == "treated:post") %>%
    mutate(outcome = y)
}

did_tbl <- map_dfr(outcomes, fit_one) %>%
  mutate(
    conf.low = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    conf.high = estimate + 1.96 * std.error
  )
did_tbl


```

```{r}

ggplot(did_tbl, aes(x = reorder(outcome, estimate), y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "DID estimate (treated × post)",
    title = "Estimated treatment effects across outcomes",
    subtitle = "Model: DID + section×year FE + baseline covariates; SE clustered by contig_group_id"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

branas_es <- branas_panel %>%
  mutate(event_time = year - greening_year) %>%
  filter(event_time >= -5, event_time <= 5)  # 你可改視窗


```

```{r}

m_es <- lm(
  crime_gun_assaults ~
    factor(event_time) * treated +
    area_sqft + median_age + unemployed_sqmi + college_sqmi + income_sqmi +
    black_sqmi + hispanic_sqmi + poverty_sqmi + vacant_lot_density +
    factor(section):factor(year),
  data = branas_es
)
V_es <- vcovCL(m_es, cluster = ~contig_group_id, type = "HC1")

es_tbl <- tidy(m_es, vcov = V_es) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, "^factor\\(event_time\\)")) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, ":treated$")) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = as.integer(str_extract(term, "-?\\d+")),
    conf.low = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    conf.high = estimate + 1.96 * std.error
  ) %>%
  arrange(event_time)

ggplot(es_tbl, aes(x = event_time, y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -1, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Event time (year - greening_year)",
    y = "Effect relative to event_time = -1",
    title = "Event-study: crime_gun_assaults",
    subtitle = "Clustered SE by contig_group_id; with section×year FE + baseline covariates"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}


did_tbl %>%
  select(outcome, estimate, std.error, statistic, conf.low, conf.high)



```

```{r}

nice_outcome <- c(
  crime_gun_assaults    = "Gun assaults",
  crime_robberies       = "Robberies",
  crime_vandalism       = "Vandalism",
  crime_disorderly      = "Disorderly conduct",
  crime_illegal_dumping = "Illegal dumping",
  health_high_stress    = "High stress (%)",
  health_high_chol      = "High cholesterol (%)",
  health_high_bp        = "High blood pressure (%)",
  health_low_exercise   = "Low exercise (%)",
  health_poor_health    = "Poor/Fair health (%)"
)

did_plot_df <- did_tbl %>%
  mutate(outcome_label = recode(outcome, !!!nice_outcome))


```

```{r}

ggplot(did_plot_df, aes(x = reorder(outcome_label, estimate), y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "DID estimate (treated × post)",
    title = "Effect of vacant lot greening across outcomes",
    subtitle = "DID + section×year FE + baseline covariates; SE clustered by contig_group_id"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

did_plot_df <- did_plot_df %>%
  mutate(domain = if_else(str_detect(outcome, "^crime_"), "Crime", "Health"))

ggplot(did_plot_df, aes(x = reorder(outcome_label, estimate), y = estimate)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.2) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~domain, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "DID estimate (treated × post)",
    title = "Effect of vacant lot greening: crime vs health outcomes",
    subtitle = "SE clustered by contig_group_id; section×year FE; baseline covariates"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}
did_plot_data <- branas_panel %>%
  group_by(year, treated) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_outcome = mean(crime_gun_assaults, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )



```

```{r}

treat_year <- branas_panel %>%
  filter(treated == 1) %>%
  summarize(avg_year = mean(greening_year, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(avg_year)


```

```{r}
ggplot(did_plot_data,
       aes(x = year, y = mean_outcome, color = factor(treated))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = treat_year, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    color = "Treated",
    y = "Mean Gun Assaults",
    title = "Difference-in-Differences: Gun Assaults",
    subtitle = "Pre vs Post comparison"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



```

```{r}

did_plot_data <- did_plot_data %>%
  mutate(group = if_else(treated == 1, "Greened lots", "Control"))

ggplot(did_plot_data,
       aes(x = year, y = mean_outcome, color = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = treat_year, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = treat_year + 0.5,
           y = max(did_plot_data$mean_outcome),
           label = "Treatment",
           hjust = 0) +
  labs(
    y = "Mean Gun Assaults",
    title = "Effect of Vacant Lot Greening on Gun Assaults",
    subtitle = "Standard DID visualization"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

did_long <- branas_panel %>%
  select(
    year, treated, greening_year,
    crime_gun_assaults,
    crime_robberies,
    crime_vandalism,
    crime_disorderly,
    crime_illegal_dumping,
    health_high_stress,
    health_high_chol,
    health_high_bp,
    health_low_exercise,
    health_poor_health
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(year, treated, greening_year),
    names_to = "outcome",
    values_to = "value"
  )


```

```{r}
did_means <- did_long %>%
  group_by(outcome, year, treated) %>%
  summarize(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")



```

```{r}

ggplot(did_means,
       aes(x = year, y = mean_value, color = factor(treated))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = treat_year, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    color = "Treated",
    y = "Mean outcome",
    title = "Difference-in-Differences across outcomes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```

```{r}




```
